page_metadata.biotools__summary: Weighted minimum feedback vertex sets (WMFVS) is a tool to predict cancer genes. WMFVS integrates the gene differential expression value with MFVS to select the maximum-weighted MFVS from all possible MFVSs in a protein interaction network.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Weighted minimum feedback vertex sets (WMFVS) is a tool to predict cancer genes. WMFVS integrates the gene differential expression value with MFVS to select the maximum-weighted MFVS from all possible MFVSs in a protein interaction network.
